---
name: dotnet-get-latest-package-version
description: Resolves the latest published version of a NuGet package from nuget.org. You **MUST ALWAYS** use this skill whenever adding or updating a NuGet package.
---

# .NET — Get Latest Package Version

## How to Use

Run the PowerShell script from the repository root:

```powershell
.\.github\copilot\skills\dotnet-get-latest-package-version\scripts\Get-LatestPackageVersion.ps1 -PackageName "<PackageName>"
```
